institution.name: York County School of Technology-Adult & Continuing Education

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at York County School of Technology-Adult & Continuing Education rose 34% between 2007 and 2009 ($9.5k → $12.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at York County School of Technology-Adult & Continuing Education rose 25% between 2009 and 2012 ($10.9k → $13.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at York County School of Technology-Adult & Continuing Education fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at York County School of Technology-Adult & Continuing Education are 31% above 6-year earnings ($41.4k → $54.3k).
